title: Deployments Config
description: A deployments configuration, for a component

environments.description: A map of environments, currently no fields are supported for environments

sequence.title: Deployment sequence
sequence.description: The series of steps the deployment pipeline should follow. Each step will trigger the next

environment.description: The environment which should be deployed to during this step

release-type.description: If specified, this parameter determines the type of release that will be created during this step
